title: rosa canina var. recognita
intro: Rosa canina var. recognita, also known as the dwarf dog rose or dwarf wild rose, is a shrubby perennial plant species that is a variant of the common dog rose. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. recognita lie in its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, particularly vitamin C, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa canina var. recognita can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate colds, fever, and digestive issues.
